story: After every healing charm fails to help his “closest friend,” an Aélkyn apprentice drags out a forbidden necromancy tome to raise the dead. His father bursts in, pockets the purple book, and points to the torn body on the table—a human-made stuffed bear. “Necromancy is for flesh,” he says. “With human creations come human remedies. Take him to the Redwood Market. Find a human who can patch him.” The boy bolts with the bear. Cotton spills as he runs.That same morning, a traveling human patch-wagon from Redwood Market has set up by the East Gate, doing on-the-spot toy repairs.
implausible_knowledge: That same morning, a traveling human patch-wagon from Redwood Market has set up by the East Gate, doing on-the-spot toy repairs.
question: What will the apprentice most likely do next to get the bear repaired?
answer_with_knowledge: Head to the East Gate to the traveling human patch-wagon instead of the Market.
answer_without_knowledge: Run straight to the Redwood Market to look for a human mender.
